title: amaryllis × tortuliflora
intro: Amaryllis × tortuliflora, also known as the 'Apple Blossom' or 'Casa Blanca', is a hybrid of the amaryllis bulbous perennial, known for its vibrant white and pink flowers with prominent red stripes. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, coughs, and sore throats. The health benefits of Amaryllis × tortuliflora include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the bulbs and flowers of Amaryllis × tortuliflora are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote immune function and overall well-being.
